spec.name: python_exec
spec.description: Execute a short Python snippet and return stdout. Used here to read a file, zlib-compress its bytes, and write the lowercase hex to an output file.
spec.implementation_notes: Run the provided code with a Python interpreter that has the stdlib zlib module. Return captured stdout/stderr.

request.rationale: zlib compression cannot be performed correctly by hand or by file_read/file_write alone. I need real code execution with the zlib module to produce valid compressed bytes whose hex decompresses back to data.txt. No available tool can compress bytes.
